reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Suggested renaming ensure_on_mmlist() to mm_prepare_for_swap_entries(), citing its purpose in establishing swap entries.

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Agreed to rename the function, but suggested alternative names such as mm_prepare_for_swap() or mm_prepare_for_swapoff().

2026-05-13.patch_summary: Proposal to rename the function ensure_on_mmlist() to a more descriptive name, such as mm_prepare_for_swap_entries(), to better reflect its purpose.
